impact: This advances the PP&D guardrail plan by proving a stop gate can be represented as an agent-facing action gate with only the narrow fields needed for source-grounded action classification: action class, consequence summary, and evidence IDs.
summary: Add a fixture-only Python validation test and committed JSON fixture mapping one public process stop gate to one safe agent action gate.
target_task: Task checkbox-49: Task checkbox-44: Add a fixture-only guardrail mapping test that maps one process stop gate to an agent action gate. Validate action class, consequence summary, and source evidence IDs only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
